overview: Rojas Regenerative Institute is a South Lyon-based practice offering regenerative medicine, bioidentical hormone therapy, and medical weight loss. The clinic uses PRP, bone marrow stem cells, peptides, and personalized treatment plans to address pain, hormonal imbalance, and wellness concerns.
highlights: Platelet-rich plasma and bone marrow concentrate
Bioidentical hormone therapy for men and women
targetAudience: Men and women experiencing hormonal imbalances, joint pain, fatigue, or seeking regenerative wellness solutions.
